page.content: As the integration of embedded finance solutions continues to reshape the payment landscape in North America, understanding the adoption curves of digital wallets is critical for stakeholders in the fintech sector. The data presented in Table 1 illustrates significant growth trends in this domain, marked by a notable revenue increase to $220M in 2020, which reflects a year-over-year change of 46.7%. This upward trajectory underscores the increasing consumer reliance on digital wallet solutions, with an impressive market share of 7.0% captured within that same year.

lines.text: As the integration of embedded finance solutions continues to reshape the payment landscape in North America, understanding
the adoption curves of digital wallets is critical for stakeholders in the fintech sector. The data presented in Table 1 illustrates
significant growth trends in this domain, marked by a notable revenue increase to $220M in 2020, which reflects a year-over-
year change of 46.7%. This upward trajectory underscores the increasing consumer reliance on digital wallet solutions, with an
impressive market share of 7.0% captured within that same year.

page.content: Additionally, the number of users engaging with these platforms surged to 25M, showcasing a growing acceptance among consumers.

page.content: The report further highlights that as of 2021, the revenue from embedded finance solutions is projected to continue on this positive path, with estimates indicating a revenue growth to $300M. The anticipated year-over-year change is expected to reach an impressive 20%, reinforcing the momentum in this sector. It is essential for businesses to remain agile in response to these trends, as the expanding market share, currently standing at 36.4% for the projected revenue of $300M, signifies a robust opportunity for investment and innovation in digital payment solutions.
